title: VimFu — Ctrl-X Ctrl-] Tag Completion
description: Ctrl-X Ctrl-] in insert mode completes from tags generated by ctags.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Control X Control close bracket completes from your tags file. If you've generated tags with c tags, this gives you project-wide completion.
This requires a tags file. Run c tags on your project to generate one. Then in insert mode, type a prefix and Control X Control close bracket to complete from your tag names.
Tags include function names, class names, and variables from your entire project. Not just the current file.
Control X Control close bracket. Tag completion. Generate tags with c tags, then complete any symbol across your whole project.
